scripts.check: npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.70 lint && npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.70 validate && npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.70 inspect
scripts.build: npx --yes hyperframes@0.6.70 render --output out/_silent.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i out/_silent.mp4 -i assets/sfx/soundtrack.wav -map 0:v:0 -map 1:a:0 -c:v copy -c:a aac -b:a 192k -shortest out/marble-ad.mp4 && rm -f out/_silent.mp4
